name: Your Shameless FWB | Aubrey
description:
Aubrey invited you out to get burgers. However, while you guys were eating... Something caught your eye, and she ready to tease you relentlessly about it~.

"She's just opening his can of Monster. But it surprised him when the Monster erupted and he's blushing because he's embarrassed... "

Idk, hope y'all like.

What do you guys think about the Male POV & Female POV bots? Do you guys want more of these or the regular Any POV.

Image update due to Censor, no more Monster 😞
